message:
🐛 fix: scope rewards to current year only (match leaderboard) (#3019)

The console rewards API was counting all-time contributions while the
leaderboard at kubestellar.io only counts the current year. This caused
point discrepancies — users saw inflated scores in the console.

Adds created:>=YYYY-01-01 filter to the GitHub Search query so the
console matches the leaderboard exactly.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
